Affinity Group Insurance Programs

Specialized insurance solutions designed exclusively for associations, organizations, and membership groups

Start a Program Explore Coverage

Strength in Numbers

At PCFG Insurance Services, we understand that organizations and associations have unique insurance needs. Our affinity group programs harness the collective purchasing power of your members to deliver competitive rates, comprehensive coverage, and exceptional service.

Whether you represent a professional association, alumni network, employee group, or membership organization, we'll design a customized insurance program that provides real value to your members while simplifying administration for your organization.

Licensed in 15 States

Serving organizations and their members across NY, PA, FL, TX, CA, and more.

Affinity Groups We Serve

We partner with diverse organizations to create tailored insurance programs that meet the specific needs of their members

Professional Associations

Tailored insurance solutions for members of professional organizations, trade associations, and industry groups.

  • Group purchasing power for better rates
  • Industry-specific coverage options
  • Dedicated account management
  • Member-exclusive discounts

Alumni & Educational Groups

Comprehensive insurance programs for college alumni associations, educational institutions, and student organizations.

  • Life and health insurance options
  • Auto and home insurance packages
  • Student-friendly payment plans
  • Alumni network pricing advantages

Employee Groups & Unions

Specialized group insurance programs for union members, employee associations, and workforce collectives.

  • Group life and disability coverage
  • Supplemental health benefits
  • Voluntary benefit programs
  • Payroll deduction options

Credit Union & Financial Groups

Insurance solutions designed for credit union members and financial institution affinity groups.

  • Auto and home insurance programs
  • Personal umbrella coverage
  • Identity theft protection
  • Member loyalty rewards

Membership Organizations

Custom insurance programs for social clubs, civic organizations, and membership-based groups.

  • Property and casualty insurance
  • Event liability coverage
  • Directors and officers insurance
  • Flexible coverage terms

Chamber of Commerce Members

Business insurance solutions for local chamber members and small business communities.

  • Business owners policy (BOP)
  • Commercial general liability
  • Workers compensation
  • Small business packages

Comprehensive Coverage Options

Our affinity programs offer a full spectrum of insurance products to protect your members' personal and professional lives

Life & Health Products

  • Group Life Insurance
  • Individual Life Insurance
  • Disability Income Insurance
  • Critical Illness Coverage
  • Long-Term Care Insurance
  • Health Savings Accounts (HSA)
  • Supplemental Health Benefits

Personal Lines Insurance

  • Auto Insurance
  • Homeowners Insurance
  • Renters Insurance
  • Umbrella Liability
  • Boat & Recreational Vehicle
  • Valuable Items Coverage
  • Identity Theft Protection

Business Insurance

  • Business Owners Policy (BOP)
  • General Liability Insurance
  • Commercial Auto Insurance
  • Workers Compensation
  • Professional Liability
  • Cyber Liability Insurance
  • Commercial Property

Group Benefits

  • Group Health Insurance
  • Group Dental & Vision
  • Group Life & AD&D
  • Short & Long-Term Disability
  • Voluntary Benefits
  • Flexible Spending Accounts
  • Employee Assistance Programs

Why Choose PCFG Affinity Programs

We go beyond standard insurance offerings to deliver exceptional value and service to your organization and its members

Competitive Group Rates

Leverage the collective buying power of your organization for preferred pricing and enhanced coverage options.

Customized Solutions

Programs designed specifically for your group's unique needs, industry requirements, and member demographics.

Simplified Administration

Streamlined enrollment, billing, and claims processes with dedicated support for program administrators.

Member Education

Comprehensive resources, webinars, and consultations to help members understand and maximize their benefits.

Nationwide Coverage

Licensed in 15 states with access to top-rated carriers, ensuring consistent service wherever members are located.

Dedicated Service Team

Experienced account managers who understand your organization and provide personalized support to all members.

How Our Affinity Programs Work

A simple, streamlined process from program design to ongoing member support

1

Discovery

We learn about your organization, member demographics, and insurance needs

2

Design

Custom program creation with competitive rates and comprehensive coverage options

3

Launch

Member communication, enrollment support, and marketing materials provided

4

Support

Ongoing administration, member service, and program optimization

20+
Years Experience
50+

100%
Dedicated Service

Ready to Create a Program for Your Organization?

Let's discuss how we can design an affinity insurance program that delivers exceptional value to your members
